howItWorks.description: No middlemen, no guesswork. Kerala Hub handles the boring-but-important parts so you can focus on playing.

steps.title: 1. Browse verified IDs
steps.copy: Hand-picked accounts across GTA V, PUBG, Valorant, Free Fire, FIFA and more.

steps.title: 2. KYC-cleared sellers
steps.copy: Every seller passes identity verification before a listing goes live.

steps.title: 3. Chat & inspect
steps.copy: Ask for screenshots, rank proof, or a live tour before you commit.

steps.title: 4. Safe handover
steps.copy: Pay through escrow — funds release the moment you confirm access.

faq.title: Questions, answered
faq.description: Everything most players ask before their first trade. Still stuck? Ping us in chat.

items.q: Is buying a gaming ID on Kerala Hub actually safe?
items.a: Every seller is KYC-verified and all payments are held in escrow until you confirm a successful handover. If something goes wrong, support steps in within 24 hours.

items.q: Which games can I buy or sell accounts for?
items.a: GTA V, PUBG, Valorant, Free Fire, FIFA/FC, Call of Duty, Fortnite, Clash of Clans and more. If your game isn't in the catalogue, pick 'Other' in the sell form and we'll curate it.

items.q: How long does a handover take?
items.a: Most deals wrap in under five minutes once payment clears. The seller transfers credentials, you verify, and escrow releases instantly.

items.q: What fees does Kerala Hub charge?
items.a: Browsing and chatting are free. We take a small service fee on completed sales only — no surprise charges, no subscriptions.

items.q: Can I list my account without completing KYC?
items.a: No — verification protects buyers and keeps the marketplace reputable. It takes about two minutes and unlocks listings, payouts and verified-only messaging.

items.q: What happens if a seller doesn't hand over access?
items.a: File a dispute from the listing chat. Escrow holds the funds, our team reviews the conversation, and you get a full refund if the seller can't deliver.

homeCta.title: Your next gaming ID is one scroll away.

faqPage.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faqPage.subtitle: Can't find an answer? Email support@keralahub.gg and we'll get back to you.
faqPage.metaDescription: Frequently asked questions about Kerala Hub.

items.a: Kerala Hub is a premium marketplace for gaming IDs, in-game items, currency, and boosting services, with built-in verification and secure transfers.

items.q: How do I sell a gaming account?
items.a: Create an account, complete KYC verification, click 'Sell ID' on the home screen, and submit your listing with media, details, and price. We review listings for compliance before going live.
Payments are held in escrow until the buyer confirms the account has been transferred and works as described. If something goes wrong, our support team mediates.

items.q: How do I reset my password?
items.a: On the login page, choose 'Forgot password', request an OTP to your email or phone, verify it, then set a new password.
KYC helps prevent fraud and chargebacks, and is required to list an account or withdraw earnings. Your documents are stored securely and never shared without consent.

items.q: How do I delete my account?
items.a: Go to your profile settings and click 'Delete account'. All listings, KYC records, and profile data are permanently removed, subject to legal retention requirements.

items.q: What fees does Kerala Hub charge?
items.a: Fees are disclosed before you confirm each transaction. We currently charge a small marketplace fee for successful sales and standard payment processor fees.

items.q: I can't log in — what do I do?
items.a: Ensure you're using the correct email/phone, try the OTP login option, or contact support@keralahub.gg for help.
